description: Complete a post-auto-reset conversation by populating its emptied MLS state (group_info, welcome messages). The post-reset row exists with id=originalConvoId, group_id=newGroupId, and group_info=NULL — this endpoint UPDATEs that row in place rather than INSERTing a new conversation. First caller (in the existing member roster) for a given (originalConvoId, newGroupId) wins; later callers receive AlreadyBootstrapped 409 and fall back to receiving the Welcome from the winner.

main.description: Bootstrap a post-auto-reset conversation in place. Member roster is preserved across reset, so this endpoint does not re-insert members.

originalConvoId.description: Stable conversation id (unchanged across resets). Matches conversations.id.

newGroupId.description: Hex-encoded post-reset MLS group id. Must match the conversations.group_id value set by the auto-reset that emitted the groupResetEvent.

cipherSuite.description: MLS cipher suite for the new group

groupInfo.description: Encoded MLS GroupInfo for the new group at epoch 1

members.description: DIDs of the bootstrapped roster (typically read from getConvos pre-bootstrap). Sent for diagnostic/audit purposes; server uses the persisted members table (preserved across reset) as the authoritative roster.

welcomeMessage.description: MLS Welcome envelope for ALL members. Stored per-recipient based on keyPackageHashes.

keyPackageHashes.description: Per-member key package hashes used in the Welcome

currentEpoch.description: Bootstrap epoch (always 1 — fresh group at epoch 1). Sent for telemetry; server hard-sets current_epoch = 1.

metadataBlobLocator.description: Optional locator for encrypted group metadata re-published for newGroupId. The blob itself is uploaded through putGroupMetadataBlob; this field lets clients declare the locator used by the reset winner.

metadataVersion.description: Optional encrypted metadata version associated with metadataBlobLocator.

convo.description: The now-bootstrapped conversation view, including the preserved member roster

generation.description: Generation number of the now-active crypto_session (preserved across self-heal; freshly minted across activate). Clients seed pendingResetGeneration with this value on bootstrap success so subsequent SSE replay events carrying a stale `gen` are short-circuited before destructive recovery (e.g. deleteGroup) fires. Optional for backward compatibility — older clients that miss the field fall back to fetching it via getConversation/getGroupState.

errors.name: BootstrapTargetNotFound
errors.description: No conversation row matches (originalConvoId, newGroupId). Either the convo doesn't exist, or the post-reset group_id has already been overwritten by a subsequent reset.

errors.name: AlreadyBootstrapped
errors.description: The post-reset row has already been bootstrapped by another caller (group_info IS NOT NULL). Caller lost the first-responder race; fall back to receiving the Welcome from the winner.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Caller is not in the existing member roster for this convo and so is not allowed to bootstrap it.

errors.name: InvalidCipherSuite
errors.description: The specified cipher suite is not supported.

keyPackageHashEntry.description: Maps a member DID to the SHA-256 hash of the key package consumed to wrap their Welcome.

hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 hash of the key package used
